hero.badge: Ngoku ikhusela iintsapho zaseMzantsi Afrika · Isimahla ukuqala
hero.headline: Umntwana wakho ukhuselekile kwi-intanethi. Siqinisekile ngako.
hero.subheadline: Kuphela komhlaba wedijithali wokhuseleko eyakhelwe iintsapho zaseMzantsi Afrika. Ibeka iliso kwi-WhatsApp. Ithetha isiZulu. Ilungile kwimizuzu emi-5.
hero.trust: Iyahambelana ne-POPIA · Akukho khadi letyala lidingekayo · Rhoxisa nanini na

problem.title: Zonke izixhobo zokhuseleko zehlabathi zakhelwe bona. Ayisiyo eyakho.
problem.p1: Umntwana wakho uhlala kwi-WhatsApp. Ayikho i-iMessage. Ayikho i-Snapchat.
problem.p2: I-Bark ixabisa i-R260 ngenyanga kwaye ayijongi i-WhatsApp. I-Qustodio ayithethi isiBhulu. I-Google Family Link inokugqithwa kwimizuzwana engama-30.
problem.p3: ISafeNet SA yakhelwe eSoweto, eStellenbosch, ePolokwane, kunye nayo yonke intsapho ephakathi.

howItWorks.label: Indlela iSafeNet SA esebenza ngayo
howItWorks.headline: Yimisela kwimizuzu emi-5. Ukhuselo oluhlala luhleli.
howItWorks.step1: Khuphela kwaye ungene ngenombolo yakho yaseMzantsi Afrika. Akukho magama ayimfihlo afunekayo.
howItWorks.step2: Skena ikhowudi ye-QR kwifowuni yomntwana wakho. Imizuzwana engama-60.
howItWorks.step3: I-Luna AI ijonga ngoko nangoko. Izilumkiso ngolwimi lwakho.

features.headline: Yonke into umzali waseMzantsi Afrika ayifunayo
features.whatsapp: Ukubekwa kweliso kwi-WhatsApp. Kwisixhobo somntwana wakho. Ngasese.
features.whatsappDesc: Kuphela kweqonga eliziqondayo izoyikiso ze-WhatsApp ngesiZulu, isiBhulu, isiSuthu nesiXhosa. Ayikho into egqithiselwayo. Ukhuselekile kwi-POPIA.

cta.headline: I-3.2 yezigidi zeentsapho zaseMzantsi Afrika ziyayidinga le nto. Owakho ngomnye wazo.
cta.sub: Qala ukukhusela intsapho yakho namhlanje. Simahla ukuzama. Iyahambelana ne-POPIA. Ilungile kwimizuzu emi-5.

footer.description: Isiseko sosasazo lokhuseleko lwedijithali kwiintsapho zaseMzantsi Afrika. Izelwe apha. Yakhelwe apha.

auth.phonePrompt: Faka inombolo yakho yaseMzantsi Afrika ukuze uqale
auth.verifyHint: Faka ikhowudi enamanani ama-6 ethunyelwe ku-+27
auth.consentDesc: Ngaphantsi koMthetho woKhuselo loLwazi lobuQu waseMzantsi Afrika, sifuna imvume yakho koku kulandelayo:
